definition: The candle or zone where price first returns to an unmitigated point of interest (FVG, OB, or breaker block) on a higher timeframe. Mitigation is the process of institutional orders being filled at a previously identified level. The mitigation block marks WHERE this filling occurs — it's the first touch of an unfilled imbalance.
depends_on: breaker_blocks (first touch of breaker = mitigation event)
feeds_into: entry_models (mitigation block = continuation entry after first retest)
risk_management (SL beyond the mitigation candle extreme)

concept.unmitigated: A zone (OB, FVG, breaker) that has NOT been revisited since formation — fresh, untested
concept.mitigated: A zone that has been touched/tested — orders at that level have been partially or fully filled
concept.mitigation_block: The specific candle/zone where the first touch of an unmitigated level occurs
concept.why_it_matters: First touch of an unmitigated zone has the highest probability of reaction because all pending orders are still there

formation_rules.step_1: HTF creates a point of interest (OB, FVG, breaker) that price moves away from
formation_rules.step_2: Price returns to the POI for the FIRST time — this is the mitigation event
formation_rules.step_3: The candle that touches the POI becomes the mitigation block
formation_rules.step_4: If price reacts (reverses from the POI), the mitigation block is confirmed
formation_rules.step_5: The mitigation block itself can be used as a LTF entry zone on subsequent pullbacks

ob_mitigation.trigger: Price returns to an unmitigated OB for the first time
ob_mitigation.reaction: Strong — full pending orders at OB level
ob_mitigation.entry: Enter at the OB zone on the first touch, SL beyond OB

fvg_mitigation.trigger: Price fills back into an unmitigated FVG
fvg_mitigation.reaction: Moderate — depends on FVG quality and timeframe
fvg_mitigation.entry: Enter at FVG CE on the fill, SL beyond far edge of FVG

breaker_mitigation.trigger: Price returns to a breaker block for the first time
breaker_mitigation.reaction: Strong — flipped polarity means strong opposing orders
breaker_mitigation.entry: Enter at breaker CE, SL beyond breaker

first_touch_principle.rule: The FIRST touch of any unmitigated zone is the highest-probability trade
first_touch_principle.statistics: First touch reaction rate: ~70%. Second touch: ~50%. Third: ~35%.
first_touch_principle.implication: Always prioritize virgin/unmitigated zones over retested ones
first_touch_principle.tracking: Mark zones as 'mitigated' after first touch — reduce score weight on subsequent visits

htf_ltf_alignment.process: Identify POI on HTF (4H/Daily) → drop to LTF (M15/M5) for precise entry at mitigation
htf_ltf_alignment.advantage: HTF gives the level, LTF gives the timing — tight SL + high R:R
htf_ltf_alignment.example: Daily OB at 72,500. Drop to M15 → watch for displacement + FVG at 72,500 → enter on M15 FVG CE

bridge_integration.tracking: Maintain a touch_count for each detected OB/FVG/breaker zone
bridge_integration.first_touch_flag: When price enters an unmitigated zone for the first time, set mitigation_event = True
bridge_integration.score_boost: First-touch zones get higher ICT score than retested zones
bridge_integration.zone_expiry: After 3 touches, remove zone from active consideration
